title: triticum angustum
intro: Triticum angustum, also known as Narrow-spiked wheat-grass or Brome, is a type of wild grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Triticum angustum include its ability to help reduce stress, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The herbal preparations of Triticum angustum can be made into teas, infusions, or capsules, and are often used to promote overall well-being and vitality.
